docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Base URL
docs.text: http://localhost:8000

docs.title: POST /query
docs.text:
Send a natural language query to the Supervisor Agent.

Request 

{
  "query": "What are the findings on skin microbiome?",
  "mode": "auto"
}

Parameters - query (string) — the natural language question - mode (string) — auto, rag, analytics, or hybrid

Response 

{
  "answer": "Based on retrieved documents...",
  "sources": ["doc1.pdf", "doc2.pdf"],
  "tool_used": "rag",
  "tokens_used": 1245
}

docs.title: POST /ingest
docs.text:
Trigger document ingestion from SharePoint.

Response 

{
  "status": "success",
  "documents_indexed": 24,
  "duration_seconds": 12.4
}

docs.title: GET /health
docs.text:
Health check endpoint.

Response 

{
  "status": "ok",
  "version": "1.0.0"
}

docs.title: GET /stats
docs.text:
Returns platform usage statistics.

Response 

{
  "total_queries": 142,
  "documents_indexed": 24,
  "avg_response_time_ms": 1823
}

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Gradio UI
    ↓
FastAPI Backend
    ↓
LangGraph Supervisor Agent
    ├── RAG Tool → Azure AI Search + Claude
    └── Analytics Tool → Pandas Agent + Claude

docs.title: Supervisor Agent
docs.text: LangGraph state machine that decides which tool to invoke based on the user query. Supports multi-step reasoning and tool chaining.

docs.title: RAG Pipeline
docs.text:
1. Documents ingested from SharePoint via Microsoft Graph API
  2. Split into chunks with overlap
  3. Embedded with Sentence Transformers (local, free)
  4. Indexed in Azure AI Search
  5. Hybrid search (semantic + keyword) at query time
  6. Reranking for precision
  7. Claude generates final answer from retrieved context

docs.title: Analytics Agent
docs.text: LangChain Pandas agent that translates natural language into Python/pandas operations over CSV datasets.

docs.title: Data Flow
docs.text:
SharePoint → Graph API → Chunking → Embedding → Azure AI Search
                                                       ↓
User Query → Supervisor → RAG Tool → Hybrid Search → Claude → Answer
                       → Analytics Tool → Pandas → Claude → Answer

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• Python 3.11+
  • Azure account (Free tier sufficient)
  • Anthropic API key
  • Microsoft 365 account (for SharePoint)

docs.title: 1. Clone the repo
docs.text:
git clone https://github.com/TON_USERNAME/researchmind.git
cd researchmind

docs.title: 2. Create virtual environment
docs.text:
python3.11 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt

docs.title: 3. Configure environment variables
docs.text:
cp .env.example .env

Edit .env with your credentials : 

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your_key
AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=https://your-service.search.windows.net
AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=your_key
AZURE_TENANT_ID=your_tenant_id
AZURE_CLIENT_ID=your_client_id
AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET=your_client_secret
SHAREPOINT_SITE_ID=your_site_id

docs.title: 4. Run the app
docs.text:
docker-compose up

Or locally : 

uvicorn app.api.main:app --reload
python ui/gradio_app.py

docs.title: Starting the Platform
docs.text:
# Activate virtual environment
source .venv/bin/activate

# Start the API
uvicorn app.api.main:app --reload

# In a second terminal, start the UI
python ui/gradio_app.py

Open your browser at http://localhost:7860

docs.title: Querying Documents (RAG)
docs.text:
Type any question related to your research documents : 

"What are the latest findings on skin microbiome and cosmetic formulation?"
"Summarize the safety assessment for UV filter X"
"What does the OECD report say about nuclear waste management?"

The RAG engine will retrieve the most relevant chunks from SharePoint and generate a sourced answer.

docs.title: Querying Analytics Data
docs.text:
Ask data-driven questions in natural language : 

"What is the average experiment success rate per research team?"
"Show me the top 5 compounds tested in Q1 2025"
"Compare results between lab A and lab B"

The Analytics Agent translates your question into pandas operations and returns structured insights.

docs.title: Combined Queries
docs.text:
ResearchMind shines when combining both sources : 

"Based on the latest reports and our experimental data,
which compounds show the most promise for UV protection?"

The Supervisor Agent automatically routes to both tools and synthesizes a unified answer.

docs.title: Ingesting New Documents
docs.text:
New documents added to SharePoint are automatically ingested on the next pipeline run : 

python -m app.rag.pipeline
